title: Will's Campaigns - Will Forster MP
meta_description: Will Forster is campaigning on the issues that matter to people in Woking
text_excerpt: Will's Campaigns - Will Forster MP Skip to main content Will Forster MP About Will Contact Will Will's Campaigns Volunteer News Woking Lib Dems Donate Join Donate Join Will's Campaigns Hilton & Sir Robert McAlpine International Affairs Housing & Welfare Vulnerable Children Council Finance Cost of living Healthcare, Social Care & the NHS Trains News Article Will's Campaigns Will Forster is a campaigning MP, working hard on the issues that matter most to people here in Woking. No Doctors? No Development GP surgeries are now serving 30% more homes than they were just a decade ago - and yet developers are still being allowed to build without the infrastructure communities need. Too often, GP provision is promised with new developments but never delivered. Patients are left waiting longer, and local services are stretched beyond capacity. Every new development should include new or expanded GP surgeries, delivered when residents move in — not years later. The Liberal Democrats say: no doctors, no development. Sign my petition: No Doctors?
